summary: Iteration 208: Inventory XLS Pipeline Round 3 Backend Testing Complete. All 37 tests passed (17 new Round 3 tests + 20 regression tests from iter 207). Verified: (1) Auto-approve gate fires after 3 approvals with auto_applied=true, status=applied, approved_by='auto:learned-mapping', (2) Confidence formula 0.80 + 0.05*approval_count verified via learned mapping lookup, (3) POST /api/inventory-xls/backfill-pilot-docs works with dry_run=true (scan only) and dry_run=false (scan+stage), idempotent behavior confirmed, (4) Customer prefix match: sender 'user@gamerpackaging.com' correctly suggests customer code='gamer' via hint.startsWith(code) logic, (5) All iter 207 endpoints still work (ingest, staging CRUD, approve/reject, learning-summary), (6) Auto-approved flag correctly set on staging records.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_xls_staging_service.py: _should_auto_approve correctly checks all 5 conditions (learned source, confidence >= 0.95, approval_count >= 3, assigned_customer_id, no missing_required). Auto-approve gate fires inside stage_import after initial insert.
inventory_xls_parser.py: _lookup_learned_mapping uses formula min(0.99, 0.80 + 0.05 * approval_count) for confidence calculation. After 3 approvals: 0.95 (threshold met).

inventory_xls router: POST /backfill-pilot-docs at line 262 correctly scans hub_documents for pilot XLS/CSV files, classifies them, and stages if dry_run=false. Marks source docs with inventory_xls_backfilled=true for idempotency.
server.py: _run_pilot_enrichment (line 2825) calls _maybe_stage_inventory_xls (line 2857) for pilot-ingested XLS/CSV files. Non-XLS files are no-op.

inventory_xls_staging_service.py: suggest_customer_workspace uses prefix matching in both directions - code.startsWith(hint) AND hint.startsWith(code) - so 'gamerpackaging' domain matches 'gamer' customer code.
test_credentials: N/A - backend-only testing, no auth required
seed_data_creation: Created/verified 'gamer' customer for prefix matching tests. Multiple staging records created for auto-approve gate testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 208 verified Round 3 Inventory XLS Pipeline enhancements. Auto-approve gate fires when: (1) column_map.source='learned', (2) confidence >= 0.95, (3) approval_count >= 3, (4) assigned_customer_id populated, (5) no missing_required fields. Confidence formula: 0.80 + 0.05 * approval_count (capped at 0.99). Backfill endpoint scans hub_documents for pilot XLS files. Customer prefix matching works bidirectionally. All iter 207 endpoints remain functional.

auto_approve_gate: Auto-approve fires after 3 approvals - PASS (auto_applied=true, status=applied)
Auto-approve does NOT fire with approval_count < 3 - PASS (status=pending_review)
backfill_pilot_docs: Backfill idempotent (second run returns already_staged) - PASS
